comment:
It goes without saying that today nearly everyone in Zetland has changed their eating habits due to the pandemic. These changes have attracted much attention in recent times. As part of my important project that I am currently working on, I have found some useful statistics in the form of a diagram, to help give my opinion on the subject.

The information in the diagram illustrates the relative popularity of the five different eating habits. While cooking at home(41%) is the most popular, picking up a snack from a vending machine(1%) is the least. Getting meals delivered(40%) ranks just below cooking at home(41%) and roughly a third now either buy organic food(10%) at a farmer's market(8%) or eat fast food.

The diagram shows a significant difference in the ways in which people’s
eating habits have changed. Cooking at home(41%) is a great deal more popular than the use of vending machines, with 41% of respondents stating that they started cooking more, against only 1% who say they use vending machines more. As noted earlier, preparing food at home barely eclipses getting meals delivered, which 40% of people prefer.

The statistics point to an underlying problem. As getting meals delivered is very popular, it is clear that saving time has become paramount in post-Covid society, but these meals are unhealthy. However, this problem can be solved if people avoid ready meals and instead cook large dinners which can be eaten over several days.

In conclusion, I believe having good eating habits plays an important role in our lives because eating healthy food improves one’s health. People should always buy nutritious and wholesome food.

exam_topic.title: Развёрнутое письменное высказывание на основе таблицы или графика
